behavior_summary: This item script implements a simple inspect (U8P_BAG::look) label and a U8P_BAG::use action that toggles the bag UI (gump).
U8P_BAG::look: when the player examines the bag, the script emits a short bark/label 'bag' and then the U8P_BAG::look process suspends.

U8P_BAG::use: when the player uses the bag, the script reads the item's status word (via Item::getStatus). It tests bit 0x0100; if that bit is set it calls Item::closeGump(this), otherwise it calls Item::openGump(0x03, this). This effectively toggles the bag's UI open/closed state.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BAG::look is a single-entry process that immediately barks a short label and suspends (no branching).
U8P_BAG::use reads a status word into a temporary (local1), performs a single conditional on bit 0x0100, and dispatches one of two external calls (Item::closeGump or Item::openGump).
open_questions: Does the status bit 0x0100 uniformly indicate 'gump is open' for all containers, or is this bit bag-specific? (inferred to indicate open, confidence: medium)
What UI is associated with gump id 0x03 (exact inventory/gump layout is not present in the excerpt)?
Are there other side effects (permissions, ownership checks) outside this script that affect when U8P_BAG::use is allowed to open/close the gump?

main_function.name: U8P_BAG::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the short descriptive label when the player inspects/looks at the bag.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player inspects/examines the bag (engine U8P_BAG::look/inspect event mapped to this process).

function_map.name: U8P_BAG::look
function_map.role: examine/label handler; emits short bark 'bag' then suspends

function_map.name: U8P_BAG::use
function_map.role: toggle bag UI/gump open-close based on item status word

external_calls.purpose: Read the bag item's status/flags word so the script can test specific bits (status stored into local1).
Close the bag's UI/gump when the status bit 0x0100 indicates the gump is open.
Open the bag's UI/gump with id 0x03 when the status bit 0x0100 indicates the gump is closed.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This item script implements a simple inspect (U8P_BAG::look) label and a U8P_BAG::use action that toggles the bag UI (gump).
